behavioral_patterns.value:
Web-based reconnaissance blocked by security controls

Behaviors:
  • Step 1: Attempt to access threat intelligence URL
  • Step 2: Security system blocks access
  • Step 3: Generate block notification with client details

Detection: Monitor for blocked requests to security vendor URLs combined with specific attack IDs
behavioral_patterns.context: Web-based reconnaissance blocked by security controls

behavioral_patterns.value:
Potential threat intelligence gathering attempt

Behaviors:
  • Step 1: Target specific Fortinet PSIRT advisory URL
  • Step 2: Access attempt from external IP
  • Step 3: Trigger security control blocking mechanism

Detection: Track access patterns to vulnerability disclosure pages that result in security blocks

Security control enforcement and logging workflow

Behaviors:
  • Step 1: Detect suspicious web request
  • Step 2: Apply blocking policy
  • Step 3: Log attack ID and message ID
  • Step 4: Generate administrator notification

Detection: Correlate attack IDs with message IDs to identify coordinated probing attempts
behavioral_patterns.context: Security control enforcement and logging workflow

snowflake_sql:
-- KTLYST Detection Rules
-- Generated from 1 rules
-- ============================================

-- Rule 1: Detect Behavior: Web-based reconnaissance blocked by security contr
-- ID: IOC-BEHAVIOR-e6d6c35b
-- Generation: template (success)
-- Description: Detects behavior indicator 'Web-based reconnaissance blocked by security controls

Behaviors:
  • Step 1: Attempt to access thre' extracted from threat intelligence.
-- ------------------------------------------------------------
-- Behavioral Pattern Detection: Web-based reconnaissance blocked by security controls

Behaviors:
  • Step 1: Attempt to access thre
-- Source: behavioral_0
-- TTP: T1595
-- Kill Chain: 
-- Type: unknown

SELECT
    case_id,
    user_id,
    case_notes,
    case_description,
    created_at,
    'Web-based reconnaissance blocked by security controls

Behaviors:
  • Step 1: Attempt to access thre' AS matched_pattern,
    'T1595' AS ttp_code,
    'behavioral_0' AS source_span
FROM case_notes
WHERE (
    REGEXP_LIKE(LOWER(case_notes), LOWER('\\bWeb\-based\ reconnaissance\ blocked\ by\ security\ controls\
\
Behaviors:\
\ \ •\ Step\ 1:\ Attempt\ to\ access\ thre\\b'))
    OR REGEXP_LIKE(LOWER(case_description), LOWER('\\bWeb\-based\ reconnaissance\ blocked\ by\ security\ controls\
\
Behaviors:\
\ \ •\ Step\ 1:\ Attempt\ to\ access\ thre\\b'))
)
AND created_at >= DATEADD(day, -90, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())
ORDER BY created_at DESC;

compiled_outputs.splunk:
``` KTLYST Detection Rules (SPL for Splunk)
``` Generated: 3 rules from 3 indicators

``` Rule 1: Behavioral Detection - Web-based reconnaissance blocked by security controls
``` Category: discovery
``` Source: Page 1
``` MITRE: T1595
index=main sourcetype=endpoint:process process_name IN ("whoami.exe", "net.exe", "nltest.exe", "ipconfig.exe", "systeminfo.exe")
| stats count as recon_count, dc(process_name) as unique_tools, earliest(_time) as first_seen, latest(_time) as last_seen by dest, user
| where recon_count >= 3 OR unique_tools >= 2
| sort -recon_count
| table dest, user, recon_count, unique_tools, first_seen, last_seen

``` Rule 2: Behavioral Detection - Potential threat intelligence gathering attempt
``` Category: credential_access
``` Source: Page 1
``` MITRE: 
index=main sourcetype=authentication action=failure
| stats count as failed_count, dc(src_ip) as unique_ips, earliest(_time) as first_attempt, latest(_time) as last_attempt by user
| where failed_count >= 5 OR unique_ips >= 3
| sort -failed_count
| table user, failed_count, unique_ips, first_attempt, last_attempt

``` Rule 3: Behavioral Detection - Security control enforcement and logging workflow
``` Category: credential_access
``` Source: Page 1
``` MITRE: 
index=main sourcetype=authentication action=failure
| stats count as failed_count, dc(src_ip) as unique_ips, earliest(_time) as first_attempt, latest(_time) as last_attempt by user
| where failed_count >= 5 OR unique_ips >= 3
| sort -failed_count
| table user, failed_count, unique_ips, first_attempt, last_attempt

# KTLYST Detection Rules (SIGMA format)
# Generated: 3 rules from 3 indicators
# Convert to platform-native with: sigma convert -t <target>
---

title: 'KTLYST - Web-based reconnaissance blocked by security controls'
id: 700286fe-9245-5445-a47b-e04808195503
status: experimental
description: |
    Auto-generated detection rule.
    Source provenance: Page 1
level: medium
author: KTLYST
date: 2026/03/24
references:
    - 'KTLYST source: Page 1'
tags:
    - attack.detection
    - attack.t1595
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: windows
detection:
    selection:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\whoami.exe'
            - '\net.exe'
            - '\nltest.exe'
            - '\ipconfig.exe'
            - '\systeminfo.exe'
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative activity

---
